traits.label: Night Owl Index
traits.description: How much of your listening lives in the late-night window.

traits.label: Completion Style
traits.description: Higher means you usually let tracks run rather than skipping.

traits.label: Explorer Quotient
traits.description: How much your history shows one-time discoveries and experiments.

traits.label: Loyalty Core
traits.description: How concentrated your listening is around recurring favorites.

traits.label: Shuffle DNA
traits.description: How frequently shuffle mode shapes the listening journey.
